data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for form templates by service type.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of form templates categorized by service type (new patient vs returning, consultation vs procedure). However, the provided evidence does not explicitly confirm that such templates exist or are implemented in the system. The linked use case outlines the need for these templates but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating their availability or functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of form templates by service type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of form templates by service type.
